name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a new-patient visit! Happy to get you booked in (it's on us). Any preferred day/time that works for you? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure).

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're all set with Bright Smile Dental ✨
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're confirmed for {{preferred_start}} at Bright Smile Dental — we can't wait to meet you.

What to expect: a relaxed 45-minute new-patient visit with zero pressure. We'll get to know you, answer any questions, and walk you through our modern (and painless, we promise) approach to care. No surprises, no upsell.

Need to reschedule or have a question before your visit? Just reply to this email or text us back — a real human will get right back to you.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
